text.tspan: Deployment Architecture — AWS EKS | Region: ap-south-1 (Mumbai)
Leader election: only 1 PRIMARY handles feed | 3 replicas (1 per AZ) | 8 CPU, 16 GB RAM
3 replicas (1 per AZ) | 8 CPU, 16 GB RAM | Self-Healing Supervisor monitors all pods
HPA auto-scaling based on connection count and CPU
WebSocket: 30K conn/pod x 6 = 180K normal | Peak 500K: auto-scales to 12 pods
